title: Word Formation: The History of the Bicycle

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text:
The bicycle was one of the most important means of transport ever created, yet its 1.1. _________ took many years. Early machines were slow and uncomfortable, so it was a long time before bicycles gained any real 1.2. _________. Once cheaper models appeared, however, ordinary people could 1.3. _________ afford them.

A modern bicycle is wonderfully 1.4. _________: it can carry you to school, to work or into the countryside. Riders must still think about 1.5. _________, of course, which is why wearing a helmet is always sensible. Thanks to lighter materials, today's bikes are a fraction of the 1.6. _________ of the iron machines of the past.

Best of all, cycling is good for the planet. Because bikes produce no fumes, they cause far less 1.7. _________ damage than cars. They also keep us fit, so choosing two wheels instead of four is a 1.8. _________ decision in more ways than one.
